name: Libby's Pumpkin Pound Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, combine the flour, baking powder, and salt; set aside.
2. In a large bowl, cream together the butter and sugar until light and fluffy. Add the pumpkin and vanilla; mix well. Add the eggs one at a time, mixing after each addition. Gradually add the dry ingredients, mixing well.
3. Pour the batter into a greased 9x5-inch loaf pan.
4. Bake in a preheated oven at 350°F for 60-65 minutes. Cool for 15 minutes. Remove from the pan and cool on a wire rack.
